channel.title: Cost Estimator on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Cost Estimator on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: New Azure Cosmos DB cost estimator
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB cost estimator is now in public preview. It helps model throughput, storage, regions, and capacity mode before provisioning an account.

  • Source: Azure Updates
